sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109502" key="u(pofqora/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποφθορ-ά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n109502.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">corruption, decay,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:23:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.23.27</biblScope> </bibl>: pl., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seductions,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:118:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">118.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
